name: Awoken As a New Sephirah | Lobotomy Corporation
description:
"Your awakening is unexpected, but it will only aid The Script."

_____________________________

A few warnings:

This bot has spoilers for Lobotomy Corporation, to avoid spoilers, LEAVE THIS INSTANT!

I heavily reccomend to use a proxy, as this is a pretty big bot regarding the tokens. The bot might confuse characters and appearances, so please don't get confused if that happens, either reroll or edit the message to your preferance. During my testing, I used 'Gemini' proxy.

This takes place during Day 40 in Lobotomy Corporation.

Sephirah!POV. | ({{user}} is implied to have been killed off in the backstory and turned into a Sephirah)

{{user}}'s department:

As a Sephirah of "Department Da'at", {{user}}'s department specialises in the extraction of Cogito, Lobotomy Corporation's main singularity.
